name: enova365 WebAPI
summary: Planned enova365 WebAPI connector for ERP stock, document and contractor synchronization pilots.
description: Added because Marketing identifies marketplace -> ERP and price/stock synchronization as P1 monetization. enova365 documents WebAPI as a REST interface with JWT authorization, Swagger documentation, dynamic controllers and multi-database support. This connector should focus on read-only stock/product/customer queries first, then dry-run document creation after customer validation.
useCases: Compare ERP stock with BaseLinker marketplace stock.
Prepare a sales-order payload from marketplace order data.
Use customer-specific WebAPI controllers without hardcoding one ERP database layout.
